_doc: CROSS-SESSION COORDINATION BOARD (Workstream-D, 2026-06-28). ADVISORY, last-writer-wins. Every Claude session registers in `active_sessions` at start and MUST claim `merge_slot` before merging any PR, releasing it after. Purpose: serialize merges so two concurrent sessions don't both drive a merge and force each other into the behind-rebase retest churn (hit twice on 2026-06-28). The LIVE open-PR list (GitHub) is the authoritative real-time signal; this file records intent + the single merge claim. Protocol is binding: see `.claude/skills/session-coordination/SKILL.md` and `docs/CLAUDE-RULES-CANONICAL.md` (multi-session coordination). This board is NOT a hard lock — it is honour-system coordination for the small number of concurrent sessions the operator runs; the real safety net is branch-protection require-up-to-date.

schema.merge_slot: { held_by: <session_id|null>, branch: <str|null>, pr: <int|null>, claimed_at: <iso8601|null> } — at most ONE session holds this at a time. Claim before merge, clear after (merged or aborted).
schema.active_sessions: [ { session_id, branch, intent, started_at, updated_at } ] — one entry per live session; prune your own on exit. Stale entries (>24h, no matching open PR/branch) may be pruned by any session.

active_sessions.intent: Full-system audit (bot/dashboard/android): Alpaca host-routing fix (#4916, #4929) + Workstream-D session governance + consistency/zombie sweep.

Workstream-A (consistency/doc-drift): document missing REST endpoints in CLAUDE.md table (/api/bot/devices/*, /pnl/exchange, /positions/net, /strategy/attribution, diag db_info/exchange_positions/shadow_stats/version); run canonical-doc-coherence; verify 0-orphan-call claim.
